translation.共 {{total}} 条日志，导出可能耗时较久，确定继续吗？: {{total}} log records found. Export may take a while. Continue?
translation.升级成功，页面即将刷新: Upgrade successful, page will refresh shortly
Upgrade command sent, waiting for service to restart...
translation.升级请求失败，请检查 Watchtower 是否已配置: Upgrade request failed, please check if Watchtower is configured
translation.启用后可上传图片进行多模态对话: Enable to upload images for multimodal conversations
translation.拖拽图片到此处，或点击选择文件: Drag images here, or click to select files
translation.服务升级中，请勿关闭页面，已等待 {{elapsed}} 秒: Upgrading service, do not close the page. Elapsed: {{elapsed}}s
translation.服务未能在预期时间内恢复，请手动刷新页面: Service did not recover in time, please refresh the page manually
translation.（当前仅支持易支付接口，默认使用上方服务器地址作为回调地址！）: (Currently only supports Epay interface, the default callback address is the server address above!)
